Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: I've been foraged by dying bees with a better sense of humor.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: Look, I'll... assume that your intentions are genuine. It's our first time meeting, and you are awkward as Void.

Line.Text: But if you want to push boundaries, maybe get to know someone first. Your jokes will land better.
